pi_items.source: NACA airfoil nomenclature verification via https://garudauniverse.com/naca-airfoils-nomenclature/ and https://www.akiti.ca/NACA4Bkgrnd.html
QBlade documentation (https://docs.qblade.org/src/user/airfoil/airfoil.html) shows example of generating NACA 4412 profile with 100 panels; also mentioned in various NACA airfoil generation tools
Task description in task.json and export_result.sh both specify this filename at /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/generated_naca4412.dat

NACA 4-digit nomenclature: 4=maximum camber 4%, 4=camber position at 40% chord, 12=maximum thickness 12%. Verified via https://garudauniverse.com/naca-airfoils-nomenclature/, https://www.akiti.ca/NACA4Bkgrnd.html, and QBlade documentation

privileged_info_summary: NACA 4412 is a valid NACA 4-digit airfoil designation where the digits represent: 4% maximum camber, located at 40% chord from leading edge (4), with 12% maximum thickness. The expected task output filename is generated_naca4412.dat. QBlade documentation provides examples of generating NACA 4412 airfoils with 100 panel discretization points, which is a supported configuration in the software.
